ddls:
CREATE TABLE "domains" (
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each domain */,
  "domain_name" TEXT /* The domain name */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp of when the domain was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The timestamp of when the domain was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("domain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nameservers" (
  "nameserver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nameserver */,
  "nameserver_name" TEXT /* The nameserver name */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp of when the nameserver was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The timestamp of when the nameserver was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nameserver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ips" (
  "ip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each IP address */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp of when the IP address was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The timestamp of when the IP address was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dns_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each DNS record */,
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the domain */,
  "ip_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the IP address */,
  "nameserver_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the nameserver */,
  "ping_rtt" REAL /* Round-trip time for a ping request to the nameserver */,
  "query_time" INTEGER /* Time taken to resolve the DNS query in milliseconds */,
  "msg_size" INTEGER /* Size of the DNS response message in bytes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp of when the DNS record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The timestamp of when the DNS record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dns_records_nameserver_id FOREIGN KEY ("nameserver_id") REFERENCES nameservers ("nameserver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dns_records_domain_id FOREIGN KEY ("domain_id") REFERENCES domains ("domain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dns_records_ip_id FOREIGN KEY ("ip_id") REFERENCES ips ("ip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dns_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the DNS record */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* The timestamp of when the performance metric was recorded */,
  "ping_rtt" REAL /* Round-trip time for a ping request to the nameserver */,
  "query_time" INTEGER /* Time taken to resolve the DNS query in milliseconds */,
  "msg_size" INTEGER /* Size of the DNS response message in bytes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp of when the performance metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The timestamp of when the performance metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dns_performance_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES dns_records ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* The username */,
  "password" TEXT /* The password */,
  "email" TEXT /* The email */,
  "role" TEXT /* The role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp of when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The timestamp of when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the DNS record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* The type of alert */,
  "message" TEXT /* The message of the alert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp of when the alert was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The timestamp of when the alert was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES dns_records ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "optimize_suggestions" (
  "suggestion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each suggestion */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the DNS record */,
  "suggestion_type" TEXT /* The type of suggestion */,
  "description" TEXT /* The description of the suggestion */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp of when the suggestion was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The timestamp of when the suggestion was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("suggestion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_optimize_suggestions_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES dns_records ("record_id")
)
